title: Nava Toran Temple
tagline: Nava Toran Temple — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Nava Toran Temple is located at Khor, Jawad census town, under Jawad tehsil in Neemuch district, Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Nava Toran Temple is located at Khor, Jawad census town, under Jawad tehsil in Neemuch district, Madhya Pradesh, India. It is an eleventh-century temple which consists of ten decorative arches arranged in two rows. The temple decorations include leaf-shaped borders, heads of makaras, and garland bearers, Nav or nou means "nine" and toran means "pillars"; this is where the temple gets its name. The prime deity of the temple is Varaha, who is the third avatar of lord Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Jawad, Madhya Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Jawad is a Tehsil and a Nagar Panchayat in Neemuch district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Tarapur, Madhya Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Tarapur is a village located in neemuch district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is a centre for the manufacture of fashionable bandanas.

topPlaces.name: Athana
topPlaces.description: Athana is a nagar parishad in Jawad Tehsil of Neemuch district, Madhya Pradesh, India. Athana is famous for its Krishna Palace built by Rawat Narsinghdas Ji in 1628.

topPlaces.name: Nayagaon, Madhya Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Nayagaon was a village and now a Nagar Parishad in Jawad Tehsil, Neemuch district, Madhya Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhadbhadiya
topPlaces.description: Bhadbhadiya, also written Bharbhadiya, is a gram panchayat village within the Neemuch district of Madhya Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nava Toran Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nava Toran Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nava Toran Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (93 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nava Toran Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nava Toran Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nava Toran Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nava Toran Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nava Toran Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jawad, Madhya Pradesh, Tarapur, Madhya Pradesh, Athana, Nayagaon, Madhya Pradesh, Bhadbhadiya.
